violations.description: Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was reused or used more than one time. Single use cardboard was used on the floor in the walk in cooler.

Preventing contamination during storage. — --Cases of green chili links stored drectly on the floor in outside walk-in cooler instead of 6" above to protect from contamination and allow sir circulation. - Do not stack pans of cooked meats if not less than. 41 F.

Cooling of potentially hazardous food. — --Cooling foods in outside walk-in cooler are day-dated, however no times to indicate when placed in cooler. - Cool from 140-70 F. in 2 hours, 70-41 F. in 4 hours. ( dated 23:pork @ 59F, brisket-50-57F, bottom shelf chicken 56-73F)

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Shelf along wall above 3-comp sink finish coming off, shelves by electrical panel are not sealed; shelf in outside smoker bldg unfinished. Surfaces must be in good repair and sealed to be non-absorbent.
Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --BBQ Pit: not sufficient exhaust to remove/collect grease above west smoker. Buildup of grease on wall and ceiling, dripping from vent pipe.
Temperature measuring devices. — --Ensure all refrigeration units have thermometers- back walk-in cooler, pizza area refrigrators, etc.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --BBQ Pit: clean exhaust fan of grease biuildup. Clean air curtain above back door.
Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Provide chemical test papers to monitor sanitizer concentrations- Sani-T-10 QT-10/40/44

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single service items on shelf for customers are not protected from contamination: styroam foam containers need to be inverted; plastic utensils stored in a cleanable container so only handles are available to guests.

Toilet facilities. — --Bathroom doors must be self-closing to keep odors etc. out of seating areas. Hot water in bar bathroom tested at 125 F., must be adjusted between 110-120 F. Unisex bathroom-limited flow of hot water.
Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Bar: cover or seal raw wood surfaces beneath the bar.

Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Pine Sol, degreaser, windex are all stored on shelf directly above clean drainboard of 3-compartment sink. Only soap and sanitizers may be stored above this sink. Sure Kill CT511 fly spray stored with dishsoap and other cleaners under 3-comp sink. Pesticides/insecticides must be stored physically separate from other cleaners.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Proper storage, labeling, use (3 pts deducted)
Hot holding and cold holding temperatures maintained, unwrapped food not reserved (5 pts deducted)
